title: Process Engineer Vacancy at H.B. Fuller India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at H.B. Fuller India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at H.B. Fuller India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About H.B. Fuller India:
H.B. Fuller India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H.B. Fuller India!
